title: 2025 Golden Globes Best Actress Drama Series: Anna Sawai Wins for Shōgun
text: Anna Sawai won the Golden Globe for best actress in a drama series for her role in Shōgun at the 2025 Golden Globes. She beat out Kathy Bates ("Matlock"), Emma D'Arcy ("House of the Dragon"), Maya Erskine ("Mr. & Mrs. Smith"), Keira Knightley ("Black Doves"), and Keri Russell ("The Diplomat"). Sawai's win was historic in multiple ways. In September 2024, she became the first Asian actress to win an Emmy for best actress in a drama series. Additionally, the late Yoko Shimada won the very same category for the same role in the 1980 iteration of "Shōgun," becoming the first Asian actress to win a Golden Globe. Three Japanese actors—Hiroyuki Sanada, Tadanobu Asano, and Anna Sawai—secured major awards for the same series in a single night, and "Shōgun" also won the Globe for best drama series.
